Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bow Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — There is a concept known as the Bow Icon.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — The Bow Icon gives Larian keen eyesight.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The Bow Icon can provide support to a user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Malice's arrows were backed by the Bow Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Bow Icon grows closer during combat in Mercy's vision.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Attacks from Malice carry echoes of the Bow Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — The Netherworld Empress's image resonates with several Icons, including the Bow Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The Bow Icon provides sight to the Netherworld Empress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Bow Icon appeared in the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — The Bow Icon is not the closest Icon to Mercy.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy can listen to an echo of the Bow Icon to release a volley of arrows.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
